Legal information

Terms of Use

This site provides educational reference content about chopsticks, etiquette, and materials.

Reference use

Content is provided for general educational and informational use only.

No guarantee

The site does not guarantee product performance, safety outcomes, or cultural correctness in every dining context.

Content boundaries

Material comparisons, etiquette notes, and beginner recommendations are intended as practical guidance rather than professional, legal, or safety-certified advice.

Chopsticks Guide

This site explains chopstick use, materials, etiquette, and cultural context for educational reference. It does not provide medical, nutritional, or product safety guarantees.
